sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4390" key="a)ll'2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλ᾽ ἦ,</orth> in questions, <sense id="n4390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀλλά</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0016.tlg001.perseus-grc1:111:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
